# Kodra WSL

> One-command Azure developer environment for WSL2

Kodra WSL transforms a fresh WSL2 Ubuntu install into a fully-configured Azure cloud-native development workstation in minutes. Built by [Code To Cloud Inc.](https://www.codetocloud.io)

## Quick Start

```bash
wget -qO- https://kodra.wsl.codetocloud.io/boot.sh | bash
```

## What Kodra WSL Installs

- Azure CLI, Azure Developer CLI (azd), Bicep, Terraform, OpenTofu
- GitHub CLI with Copilot CLI for AI-powered terminal workflows
- Docker CE (no Docker Desktop license required), lazydocker, Dev Containers support
- Kubernetes: kubectl, Helm, k9s
- Modern terminal: Oh My Posh prompt, JetBrainsMono Nerd Font
- CLI tools: bat, eza, fzf, ripgrep, zoxide, btop, fastfetch, jq, yq
- Git: lazygit

## Key Commands

- `kodra doctor` — Check system health and tool status
- `kodra doctor --fix` — Auto-reinstall missing tools
- `kodra update` — Update all 25+ installed tools
- `kodra repair` — Interactive repair menu
- `kodra repair --all` — Repair everything automatically
- `kodra setup` — Re-run first-time configuration
- `kodra fetch` — Show system info (fastfetch)
- `kodra version` — Show version
- `kodra help` — Show all commands
